		<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1d53b018 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="1d53b018" data-element_type="container">
		<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-73156779 e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-child" data-id="73156779" data-element_type="container">
					<div class="e-con-inner">
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5fd1ca75 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="5fd1ca75" data-element_type="widget" id="post-desc" data-widget_type="text-editor.default" data-read-minutes="4">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Looking for the best champions for <a href="https://www.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/news/game-updates/league-of-legends-patch-26-9-notes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Patch 26.9</a> in League of Legends? Discover the strongest picks for every role to climb the ranked ladder.<br>
<!-- notionvc: a113dc9b-d6ba-4fac-8922-f0b68ce5412a --></p><img loading="lazy" width="800" height="450" src="https://www.hotspawn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Hotspawn-Best-Champions-in-LoL-Patch-26.9--1125x633.webp" class="custom-featured-image" alt="Best Champions you should play in League of Legends [Patch 26.9]"><p></p>
<h2>Best Champions for every role</h2>
<p><strong>Key Takeaways</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>The best champions to play in this patch 26.9 are <span class="notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="1"><strong>Singed</strong>, <strong>Nocturne</strong>, <strong>Ahri</strong>, <strong>Jinx</strong> and <strong>Sona</strong>.</span><!-- notionvc: 822f99a0-f6a9-4880-bdb8-e7ad03cbc8da --></li>
<li>The top lane meta is staying mostly the same since the recent changes weren’t enough to shift the power rankings. <strong>Kayle</strong> has managed to climb into the top three though because her ability to solo carry games is just too high to ignore right now.<br>
<!-- notionvc: a4df3e1b-298a-401e-adc3-987f684b3bc7 --></li>
<li>Nocturne has officially taken over the first place spot in the jungle. His pick potential is insane and he is punishing players across the ladder who step out of line.<br>
<!-- notionvc: 0196d95a-4324-4c93-ad25-c4843c89ff85 --></li>
<li>Ahri is still the best mid laner at the moment and is ruling the map. <strong>Malzahar</strong> is also high on the list because his wave clear and win rate are both through the roof.<br>
<!-- notionvc: ce8c6ee5-97a9-4aa8-9f26-9149bfe7da10 --></li>
<li>Sona keeps her title as the queen of supports. Right behind her is <strong>Soraka</strong> who has moved into the top two because enchanters are so strong in the current meta.<br>
<!-- notionvc: fcff2077-a1b5-44dc-b88b-515310cc9689 --></li>
</ul>
<p><span class="link-annotation-unknown-block-id--1051942156">Patch 26.9</span> has arrived as a massive overhaul to kick off Season 2: Pandemonium. While the previous update was a small bridge between seasons, this patch introduces a meta shift by bringing back legendary runes like Deathfire Touch and Stormraider’s Surge. These additions specifically support sustained damage dealers and mobile carries who were left searching for options after the removal of Phase Rush.<!-- notionvc: f7c60e2d-cc23-4d88-b656-c19a9c2db920 --><br>
<!-- notionvc: f5af7738-200b-4069-bbf6-60178728acf0 --></p>
<p>Riot is also pushing for build diversity by buffing alternate playstyles for Ezreal and Kennen while reworking Shyvana to better distinguish her AD and AP paths. Beyond champion changes, new starting items like Doran’s Bow and the return of a scaling Statikk Shiv look to shake up bot lane priority. With mid laners gaining raw stat boosts from Role Quests and top lane receiving flat XP rewards for takedowns, the game is shifting toward a high impact team fighting meta.</p>
<p>We’ll continue to update the list as the season continues. Check out our full <a href="https://www.hotspawn.com/league-of-legends/guide/best-top-laners-in-league-of-legends" target="_blank" rel="noopener">tier lists</a> to find out where your main picks are ranked.</p>
<h2><span class="notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="0">Best Top Laners Patch 26.9 – Singed, Garen, Kayle</span><!-- notionvc: ac65b575-c751-4c2b-866f-f2f60291333e --><br>
<!-- notionvc: b8d796a1-f1f6-4945-bbbb-e8dda16b527d --></h2>
<p>No one nerfs Protoplasm Harness, Singed stays at the top, it’s been patches since he reigned the top lane and things aren’t changing. He remains a niche pick which is incredibly dominant if used well.</p>
<p>Garen is also incredibly strong, his pick rate is still at <a href="https://dpm.lol/tierlist?lane=top&tier=all" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">13.3% and his win rate sits at 52%,</a> simple champion in a good state means easy way to fam LP. Kayle made it to the top three thanks to her incredible 1vs9 potential. She is also a good <strong>Dusk and Dawn</strong> user, which is a very good item at the moment, if you made it past the laning phase without dying many times, the chances to win the game are incredibly high.</p>
<figure id="attachment_163344" aria-describedby="caption-attachment-163344" style="width: 800px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><img loading="lazy" class="size-large wp-image-163344" src="https://www.hotspawn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Hotspawn-Snow-Day-Singed-1136x633.webp" alt="Snow Day Singed Skin Splash Art" width="800" height="446"><figcaption id="caption-attachment-163344" class="wp-caption-text"><em>Image Credit: Riot Games</em></figcaption></figure>
<h2><span class="notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="0">Best Junglers Patch 26.9 – Nocturne, Shen, Xin Zhao </span><!-- notionvc: bfe0dfb6-4b2a-42a2-b353-a764a14e1ed9 --><br>
<!-- notionvc: 70cf4f05-ec53-4b06-94ef-2a6b7e660e4d --></h2>
<p>Nocturne is one of the most played junglers of the patch and, despite this his win-rate sits at <a href="https://dpm.lol/tierlist?lane=jungle&tier=all" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">52%</a>. The champion has both a good clear and ganking potential after level 6 and, he can itemize as an assassin or bruiser making him incredibly flexibile.</p>
<p>Shen and Xin Zhao both stand still in the top three, they have been solid jungler for many patches and since they made it past the patch untouched they keep their spot at the top of the rankings.</p>
<figure id="attachment_174294" aria-describedby="caption-attachment-174294" style="width: 800px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><img loading="lazy" class="size-large wp-image-174294" src="https://www.hotspawn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Hotspawn-Nocturne-1073x633.webp" alt="Nocturne Splash Art" width="800" height="472"><figcaption id="caption-attachment-174294" class="wp-caption-text"><em>Image Credit: Riot Games</em></figcaption></figure>
<p><!-- notionvc: 10661f79-d56b-46ba-98d1-0cb318499381 --><br>
<!-- notionvc: 4d0e3312-5564-4a14-a4fb-18119ef093f4 --></p>
<h2><span class="notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="0">Best Mid Laners Patch 26.9 – Ahri</span>, Lissandra, Malzahar<!-- notionvc: 001dd24c-5f8b-41d8-8303-b3d09aaf46bf --></h2>
<p>Ahri continues to sit comfortably at the top of the tier list. Her wave clear is slightly less oppressing in the opening minutes, but she still reaches her core spikes with enough tempo to take over the map. Unless Riot targets her mobility or charm duration, she stays the queen of the mid lane.</p>
<p>The rest of the pool is looking kind of familiar since Lissandra is still a roaming machine, allowing her to shove waves and impact side lanes before her opponents can even react. Malzahar surpasses Kog’Maw thanks to his <a href="https://dpm.lol/champions/Malzahar/build?lane=middle&tier=all&platform=all&timeframe=16.7" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">52.2% with a 9% play rate</a>, he is the easiest mid laner to climb with.<!-- notionvc: 818a6fd3-114a-4465-aff0-5e7dff298eab --></p>
<p><!-- notionvc: d498cecd-346f-4ce1-8c6d-075c05aa8827 --></p>
<p><!-- notionvc: 315132bf-ef29-4216-a04d-d12b1758bc61 --></p>
<figure id="attachment_163346" aria-describedby="caption-attachment-163346" style="width: 800px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><img loading="lazy" class="wp-image-163346 size-large" src="https://www.hotspawn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Hotspawn-Spirit-Blossom-Ahri-Splash-Art-1073x633.webp" alt="Spirit Blossom Ahri Splash Art" width="800" height="472"><figcaption id="caption-attachment-163346" class="wp-caption-text"><em>Image Credit: Riot Games</em></figcaption></figure>
<h2><span class="notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="0">Best ADCs Patch 26.9 – </span>Jinx, Xayah, Ashe<!-- notionvc: 5d5ac40d-2928-450f-b0a9-710abd547203 --><br>
<!-- notionvc: 8ff9b8a6-cafc-492d-bf64-49143e2ccdf2 --></h2>
<p>Despite Ezreal’s adjustments, the double tear change things didn’t really change and the Zeri buffs. <a href="https://www.hotspawn.com/league-of-legends/guide/best-jinx-supports-in-lol" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="link-annotation-unknown-block-id-653873523">Ji</span><span class="link-annotation-unknown-block-id-653873523">n</span><span class="link-annotation-unknown-block-id-653873523">x</span></a> continues to dominate Solo Queue thanks to her strong 1v9 potential, especially when paired with enchanter supports, who remain highly influential in the current meta. Ashe makes it to the top three thanks to her utility and carry potential which synergizes well with enchanters.<!-- notionvc: f9293a73-ce92-4b84-982d-086af8a89c8f --><br>
<!-- notionvc: 3d942471-cd04-4f4b-8f4c-3a2f47fa2523 --></p>
<figure id="attachment_81023" aria-describedby="caption-attachment-81023" style="width: 800px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><picture><source srcset="https://www.hotspawn.com/wp-content/webp-express/webp-images/uploads/2025/02/Jinx_0-1073x633.jpg.webp" type="image/webp"><img loading="lazy" class="size-large wp-image-81023 webpexpress-processed" src="https://www.hotspawn.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Jinx_0-1073x633.jpg" alt="jinx best solo carry champions in lol" width="800" height="472"></picture><figcaption id="caption-attachment-81023" class="wp-caption-text"><em>Image Credit: Riot Games</em></figcaption></figure>
<h2><span class="notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="0">Best Supports Patch 26.9 – </span> Sona, Soraka, Milio<!-- notionvc: b5dd509e-da0c-423f-a138-5e0dc0c6ea7f --><br>
<!-- notionvc: 5a3ee2a3-390e-404e-8987-fc17a914f17e --></h2>
<p>Sona continues to be the queen of the role. She remains completely untouched at the top of the standings and looks to stay there as long as her scaling goes unpunished. Soraka managed to reclaim her spot in the top three thanks to enchanters power level, if you manage to position well Soraka is just a complete carry machine. Milio still is a good enchanter which works insanely well with every hyper carry.<br>
<!-- notionvc: f58b3137-8cad-45b6-a744-cb44c1e69e7e --></p>
<figure id="attachment_163347" aria-describedby="caption-attachment-163347" style="width: 800px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><img loading="lazy" class="wp-image-163347 size-large" src="https://www.hotspawn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Hotspawn-Sona-Splash-Art-1073x633.webp" alt="Sona Splash Art" width="800" height="472"><figcaption id="caption-attachment-163347" class="wp-caption-text"><em>Image Credit: Riot Games</em></figcaption></figure>
								</div>
				</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname + window.location.search;
    const newUrl = "https://www.rankrush.live" + currentPath;

    document.querySelectorAll('#rankrush-link img').forEach(img => {
        if (!img.closest('a')) {
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.href = newUrl;
            link.target = "_blank";
            img.parentNode.insertBefore(link, img);
            link.appendChild(img);
        } else {
            img.closest('a').href = newUrl;
        }
    });
});
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const mapTabs = document.querySelectorAll('.lol-fixture-map-overview__card');
    const mapContents = document.querySelectorAll('.lol-fixture-build__teams');
    const detailButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.lol-fixture-build__details-btn');

    if (mapTabs.length && mapContents.length) {
        mapTabs.forEach((tab, index) => {
        tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
            mapTabs.forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
            mapContents.forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));

            tab.classList.add('active');
            const target = mapContents[index];
            if (target) target.classList.add('active');
        });
        });
    }

    detailButtons.forEach(button => {
        button.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const card = button.closest('.lol-fixture-build__player-card');
        const openAbilities = card.querySelector('.lol-fixture-build__open-abilities');
        const openItems = card.querySelector('.lol-fixture-build__open-items');
        const openIcon = button.querySelector('.lol-fixture-build__icon-open');
        const closeIcon = button.querySelector('.lol-fixture-build__icon-close');
        const divider = card.querySelector('.lol-fixture-build__divider-row');

        const isOpen = card.classList.toggle('show-details');

        if (isOpen) {
            divider.classList.toggle('visible');
            openAbilities?.classList.add('visible');
            openItems?.classList.add('visible');
            openIcon.style.display = 'none';
            closeIcon.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            divider?.classList.remove('visible');
            openAbilities?.classList.remove('visible');
            openItems?.classList.remove('visible');
            openIcon.style.display = 'block';
            closeIcon.style.display = 'none';
        }
        });
    });
});
</script>
    <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];

    var themeEl = document.getElementById('hs-theme-category');
    var themeCategory = themeEl ? themeEl.getAttribute('data-theme-category') : 'N/A';

    var pageCategoryEl = document.getElementById('hs-page-category');
    var pageCategory = pageCategoryEl
        ? pageCategoryEl.getAttribute('data-page-category')
        : 'other';

    var eventTag = 'N/A';
    if (pageCategory === 'tournament' || pageCategory === 'match') {
        eventTag = document.title || 'N/A';
    }

    var wpEventTag = "N/A";
    if (wpEventTag !== 'N/A') {
        eventTag = wpEventTag;
    }

    var newsEl = document.getElementById('rr-news-category-tag');
    var newsCategoryTag = newsEl ? newsEl.getAttribute('data-news-category-tag') : 'N/A';

    function hasValidOdds() {
        const selectors = [
        '.fixture-shortcodes-odd a',
        '.fixture-shortcodes-schedule-odd-button',
        'a.odd'
        ];

        for (let selector of selectors) {
        const nodes = document.querySelectorAll(selector);

        for (let node of nodes) {
            const text = (node.textContent || '').trim();

            if (!text || text === '-') continue;

            if (!isNaN(text) && isFinite(Number(text))) {
            return true;
            }
        }
        }

        return false;
    }

    var oddsTag = hasValidOdds() ? 'yes' : 'no';

    function getTeamName() {
    if (!window.location.pathname.includes('/teams/')) return '';

    // Primary selector
    var el = document.querySelector('.team-card-name');

    // Fallback selector
    if (!el) {
        el = document.querySelector('.participant-name');
    }

    if (!el) return '';

    var name = (el.textContent || '').trim();
    return name || '';
    }

    var teamName = getTeamName();

    function getPlayerName() {
        if (!window.location.pathname.includes('/player/')) return '';
        var el = document.querySelector('.player-name');
        if (!el) return '';
        var name = (el.textContent || '').trim();
        return name || '';
    }
    var playerName = getPlayerName();

    var matchId = '';
    if (pageCategory === 'match') {
        var matchIdEl = document.getElementById('hs-match-id');
        matchId = matchIdEl ? matchIdEl.getAttribute('data-match-id') : '';
    }

    function extractBreadcrumbPath() {
        let items = [];

        const nav = document.querySelector(
        'nav.fixture-breadcrumbs,' +
        'nav.general-breadcrumbs,' +
        'nav.tournament-breadcrumbs,' +
        'nav[class$="breadcrumbs"]'
        );

        if (nav) {
        const nodes = nav.querySelectorAll('a, span.current');

        nodes.forEach(function (node) {
            let text = (node.textContent || '').trim();
            if (node.querySelector && node.querySelector('i.fa-home')) {
            text = 'Home';
            }
            if (text) items.push(text);
        });
        }

        if (!items.length) {
        const listItems = document.querySelectorAll(
            'nav.breadcrumb-trail ul.breadcrumbs li'
        );

        listItems.forEach(function (li) {
            let text = '';
            const link = li.querySelector('a');
            if (link) text = (link.textContent || '').trim();
            if (li.querySelector && li.querySelector('i.fa-home')) {
            text = 'Home';
            }
            if (text) items.push(text);
        });
        }

        return items;
    }
    var breadcrumbPath = extractBreadcrumbPath();

    function getTournamentName(pageCategory) {
        if (pageCategory === 'tournament') {
        var el = document.querySelector('.elementor-heading-title');
        if (el) return (el.textContent || '').trim();
        }

        if (pageCategory === 'match') {
        var el2 = document.querySelector('.fixture-title-tournament');
        if (el2) return (el2.textContent || '').trim();
        }

        return '';
    }
    var tournamentName = getTournamentName(pageCategory);

    window.dataLayer.push({
        event: 'page_taxonomy',
        page_data: {
        site: 'Hotspawn',
        theme_category: themeCategory,
        page_category: pageCategory,
        event_tag: eventTag,
        article_category_tag: newsCategoryTag,
        tournament_name: tournamentName,
        team_name: teamName,
        player_name: playerName,
        match_id: matchId,
        page_title: document.title,
        breadcrumb_path: breadcrumbPath
        }
    });

    });
    </script>
        <script>
    (function () {
        if (window.__hsYouTubeTrackingInitialized) {
            return;
        }
        window.__hsYouTubeTrackingInitialized = true;

        function capitalize(value) {
            if (!value) {
                return '';
            }
            return value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);
        }

        function getPathSegment(index) {
            var segments = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(function (segment) {
                return segment.length > 0;
            });
            return segments[index] || '';
        }

        function getPageCategories() {
            return {
                page_category: capitalize(getPathSegment(0)),
                theme_category: capitalize(getPathSegment(1))
            };
        }

        function getIframeTitle(iframe) {
            if (iframe.title) {
                return iframe.title;
            }
            if (iframe.dataset && iframe.dataset.videoTitle) {
                return iframe.dataset.videoTitle;
            }
            return document.title || 'video';
        }

        function pushVideoView(title) {
            window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
            var categories = getPageCategories();
            var payload = {
                event: 'video_view',
                content_title: title,
                content_type: 'video',
                page_category: categories.page_category,
                theme_category: categories.theme_category,
                publish_date: '29.04.2026'
            };
            window.dataLayer.push(payload);
            if (window.console && window.console.log) {
                console.log('hs_youtube_video_view', payload);
            }
        }

        function getProgressPercentage(player) {
            try {
                var duration = player.getDuration();
                var current = player.getCurrentTime();
                if (!duration || duration <= 0) {
                    return 0;
                }
                return Math.round((current / duration) * 100);
            } catch (error) {
                return 0;
            }
        }

        function pushVideoEngagement(title, action, percentage) {
            window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
            var payload = {
                event: 'video_engagement',
                video_title: title,
                content_type: 'video',
                action: action,
                percentage_watched: percentage,
                category: 'esports'
            };
            window.dataLayer.push(payload);
            if (window.console && window.console.log) {
                console.log('hs_youtube_video_engagement', payload);
            }
        }

        function pushVideoProgress(title, progressPercentage) {
            window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
            var categories = getPageCategories();
            var payload = {
                event: 'video_progress',
                content_title: title,
                content_type: 'video',
                page_category: categories.page_category,
                theme_category: categories.theme_category,
                publish_date: '29.04.2026',
                video_progress_percentage: progressPercentage
            };
            window.dataLayer.push(payload);
            if (window.console && window.console.log) {
                console.log('hs_youtube_video_progress', payload);
            }
        }

        function maybePushVideoProgressMilestones(iframe, player) {
            var currentPercentage = getProgressPercentage(player);
            var milestones = [25, 50, 75, 100];
            var title = getIframeTitle(iframe);

            if (!iframe.__hsYouTubeProgressMilestones) {
                iframe.__hsYouTubeProgressMilestones = {};
            }

            milestones.forEach(function (milestone) {
                if (!iframe.__hsYouTubeProgressMilestones[milestone] && currentPercentage >= milestone) {
                    iframe.__hsYouTubeProgressMilestones[milestone] = true;
                    pushVideoProgress(title, milestone);
                }
            });
        }

        function getEngagementAction(state) {
            if (state === YT.PlayerState.PLAYING) {
                return 'play';
            }
            if (state === YT.PlayerState.PAUSED) {
                return 'pause';
            }
            if (state === YT.PlayerState.ENDED) {
                return 'completed';
            }
            return null;
        }

        function maybePushVideoEngagement(iframe, player, state) {
            var action = getEngagementAction(state);
            if (!action) {
                return;
            }

            var title = getIframeTitle(iframe);
            var rawPercentage = getProgressPercentage(player);
            var percentage = action === 'completed' ? 100 : rawPercentage;
            if (!iframe.__hsYouTubeLastEngagement) {
                iframe.__hsYouTubeLastEngagement = {};
            }

            var last = iframe.__hsYouTubeLastEngagement;
            if (last.action === action && last.percentage === percentage) {
                return;
            }

            last.action = action;
            last.percentage = percentage;
            pushVideoEngagement(title, action, percentage);
        }

        function isYouTubeIframe(iframe) {
            var src = iframe.src || iframe.getAttribute('data-src') || '';
            return /(?:youtube\.com|youtu\.be)/i.test(src);
        }

        function appendEnableJsApi(src) {
            try {
                var url = new URL(src, window.location.href);
                if (url.searchParams.get('enablejsapi') !== '1') {
                    url.searchParams.set('enablejsapi', '1');
                }
                if (!url.searchParams.get('origin')) {
                    url.searchParams.set('origin', window.location.origin);
                }
                return url.toString();
            } catch (error) {
                return src;
            }
        }

        function setupPlayer(iframe, index) {
            if (!iframe.id) {
                iframe.id = 'hs-youtube-player-' + (index + 1);
            }
            if (iframe.__hsYouTubeTrackingInitialized) {
                return;
            }
            iframe.__hsYouTubeTrackingInitialized = true;

            if (iframe.src && !/enablejsapi=1/.test(iframe.src)) {
                iframe.src = appendEnableJsApi(iframe.src);
            }

            try {
                new YT.Player(iframe.id, {
                    events: {
                        onStateChange: function (event) {
                            if (event.data === YT.PlayerState.PLAYING && !iframe.__hsVideoViewSent) {
                                iframe.__hsVideoViewSent = true;
                                var title = getIframeTitle(iframe);
                                try {
                                    var data = event.target.getVideoData();
                                    if (data && data.title) {
                                        title = data.title;
                                    }
                                } catch (e) {
                                    // swallow
                                }
                                pushVideoView(title);
                            }
                            if (event.data === YT.PlayerState.PLAYING ||
                                event.data === YT.PlayerState.PAUSED ||
                                event.data === YT.PlayerState.ENDED) {
                                maybePushVideoEngagement(iframe, event.target, event.data);
                                maybePushVideoProgressMilestones(iframe, event.target);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                });
                return true;
            } catch (error) {
                if (window.console && window.console.warn) {
                    console.warn('hs_youtube_tracking_player_error', error);
                }
                return false;
            }
        }

        function attachClickFallback(iframe) {
            if (iframe.__hsVideoViewSent || iframe.__hsYouTubeClickHandlerAttached) {
                return;
            }
            iframe.__hsYouTubeClickHandlerAttached = true;
            iframe.addEventListener('click', function () {
                if (iframe.__hsVideoViewSent) {
                    return;
                }
                iframe.__hsVideoViewSent = true;
                var title = getIframeTitle(iframe);
                pushVideoView(title);
                pushVideoEngagement(title, 'play', 25);
            }, { once: true });
        }

        function initYouTubeTracking() {
            var iframes = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('iframe'));
            var youtubeIframes = iframes.filter(isYouTubeIframe);
            if (!youtubeIframes.length) {
                return;
            }

            if (window.YT && window.YT.Player) {
                youtubeIframes.forEach(function (iframe, index) {
                    if (!setupPlayer(iframe, index)) {
                        attachClickFallback(iframe);
                    }
                });
                return;
            }

            var apiScript = document.querySelector('script[src^="https://www.youtube.com/iframe_api"]');
            if (!apiScript) {
                apiScript = document.createElement('script');
                apiScript.src = 'https://www.youtube.com/iframe_api';
                document.head.appendChild(apiScript);
            }

            var existingReady = window.onYouTubeIframeAPIReady;
            window.onYouTubeIframeAPIReady = function () {
                if (typeof existingReady === 'function') {
                    existingReady();
                }
                youtubeIframes.forEach(function (iframe, index) {
                    if (!setupPlayer(iframe, index)) {
                        attachClickFallback(iframe);
                    }
                });
            };

            youtubeIframes.forEach(function (iframe) {
                attachClickFallback(iframe);
            });
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initYouTubeTracking);
        } else {
            initYouTubeTracking();
        }
    })();
    </script>
